Oversteger Studios

Scientific illustration celebrating the natural world.

Couch’s Spadefoot (Scaphiopus couchii) Pigma pen on paper (stipple), approximately 14 × 8 in.

Laura Steger’s illustrations blend scientific accuracy with artistic craftsmanship, celebrating the extraordinary detail and diversity of the natural world.
